creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
This pr fixes two minor issues with mplayer:
o Resolving a build problem on legacy 4.x releases.
  (Enforcing gcc 3.4 or newer for building works now for 4.x environments)
o Remove dependency on bitmap fonts if built without freetype support and
  without X11 support, e.g. for audio-only-player configurations.

Fix: Please apply this patch to multimedia/mplayer:
